{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Quartermaster
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Quartermaster]] is moving along the edge of the [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
